name: Spicy Pittas
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and flake the fish.
2. Mix together the fromage frais, mayonnaise, ginger, cumin, lemon rind, crushed garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the drained kidney beans and cooled French beans to the mixture.
4. Shred the lettuce and chop the tomatoes.
5. Warm the pitta breads under a hot grill until they puff up.
6. Split each pitta bread with a knife and fill with lettuce and tomatoes.
7. Top with the salmon mixture and serve immediately.
Serves 6. Approx. 290 kcals per serving.
